titleStmt.title: SII 36.122: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 122. (A.R. No. 122 of 1910.) TEṈKARAI, NILAKKOTTAI TALUK, MADURA DISTRICT. On the south wall of the first prākāra in the Mūlasthānēśvara temple.

p.hi: Māṟavarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya. Year 4 and 8th day: A.D. 1221.

summary.p: Damaged. This inscription is connected to the previous inscription. Records the royal order of the king gifting several pieces of land as maḍappuṟa iṟaiyili to Ñānadēvar of Vaṉanāyakaṉ-maṭha situated in the southern street of the temple of Mūlasthāṉam-Uḍaiyār in Teṉ-Kallaga-nāḍu, when the king was present on the throne Maḻavarāyaṉ in the palace at Madurai in Madurōdaiya-vaḷanāḍu. The taxes exempted are antarāyam, viṉiyōkam, mākkalam and taḍippadakku. Some of the details mentioned in the previous record are lost due to the damaged condition of the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmaruviya tirumaṭantaiyum puvimaṭantaiyum puyattiruppa nāmaruviya kalai maṭantaiyum jayamaṭantai
yum nalañciṟappak koḷārnta ciṉappuliyuṅ koṭuñcilaiyuṅ kulaintoḷippa vāḷārnta poṟkiri
mel varikkayalkaḷ viḷaiyāṭa viruṅkaṭal valaiyattu Iṉitaṟam perukak karuṅkali kaṭintu ceṅkol naṭap
pa vorukuṭai niḻaliruṇilaṅ kuḷira mūvakait tamiḻumuṟaimayil viḷaṅka nālvakai vētamum naviṉṟuṭaṉ viḷaṅka Ai
yvakai veḻviyuñ ceyviṉaiyiyaṟṟa Aṟuvakaic camaiyamum Aḻakuṭaṉ tikaḻa Eḻuvakaip pāṭalumiyaluṭaṉ para
va Eṇṭicaiyaḷavuñ cakkarañcellak koṅkaṇar kaliṅkar kocaḷar māḷuvar ciṅkaṇar teliṅkar kuccarar vil
lavar maākatar vikkalar cempiyar pallavar mutaliyar pārttiparellā muṟaiviṭa maruḷeṉa voruvarmuṉṉoruvar muṟai
muṟaikaṭava tantiṟai kuṇantiṟaiñca vilaṅkoḷi maṇimuṭi yintiraṉ pūṭṭiya polaṅkatirāra mārpiṉiṟ poliya paṉimalar
t tāmarait ticaimukaṉ paṭaitta maṉuṉeṟi taḻaippa maṇimuṭi cūṭip poṉṉicūḻ nāṭṭiṟ puliyāṇai poyakalak kaṉṉi
cūḻ nāṭṭuk kayalāṇai kaiyvāraveñciṉa vivuḷiyum veḻamum parappit tañcaiyumuṟantaiyuñ centaḻal koḷuttik kā
viyum nilamum niṉṟu kaviniḻappa vāviyumyāṟumaṭaiyavaṟaḷākkik kūṭamum matiḷuṅ kopura māṭaraṅku māṭamu maṇṭapa
m pala viṭittut toḻutu vantaṭaiyā nirupar tantōkaiyaraḻuta kaṇṇīrāṟu parappi kaḻutai koṇṭoḻutu kavaṭi viccic cempiyaṉai veḷai koṇṭavar tevi
veṉ peṟṟa paimpoṉ maṇimuṭi paṟittup pāṇaṉukkuk kuṭuttaruḷap pāṭarum ciṟappiṟ paruti vāṉ tōyumāṭakap puricai yāyirattaḷiyiṟ cērā vaḷavaṉ Apiṣē
ka maṇṭapattu vīrābhiṣekañ ceyutu pukaḻ virittu viḷaṅkiya maṇiyaṇi vīrasimhāsaṉattu vaḷaṅkeḻu kavari yirumaruṅkacaippa kaṭaleṉa muḻaṅkuṅ kaḷinalliyāṉai
vaṭapulaventar maṇippuyam piriyāvilaṅku kuḻaiyarivaiyar toḻutu niṉṟettu mulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ coṇā
ṭu koṇṭaruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiyatevarku yāṇṭu nālāvatu nāḷ Eṇpatiṉāl maturotaiya vaḷanāṭṭu māṭakkuḷakkīḻ maturaik koyiṟ paḷḷiyaraikūṭattu pīṭa maḻavarāya (ṉala) ṉil Eḻu
ntaruḷiyiruntu teṉkallaka nāṭṭu cimūlattāṉamuṭaiyār tirumaṭaviḷākattut teṟkut teruvil vaṉanāyakar maṭattut tapasyaril ñāṉatevar ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi
san=tāṉattut tapasyaṟkum maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyākap pākaṉūr kūṟṟattuc coḻakulāntakac caturvetimaṅkalattuk karampiṟceṭṭu śrī kraṣṇa kka māla
stiśrī coḻatevap pilāṟṟukku meṟku vākā vatikku
teṟku nilamoru māvum patiṉeḻāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟup patiṉoṉṟām pāṭakam teṟkaṭaiya nilamarai māvum paṉṉiraṇṭām pāṭaka patiṉmūṉṟām pāṭakaṉilam Oru māvum
ṉāl nilam Araimāvum patiṉeṭṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu patiṉonṟām pāṭaka nilam Orumāvum kaṇṇāṟṟu maṭakkil Oru māvum sāmarajanālp pilāṟṟukku meṟku veṟutikkut teṟku Añcāṅ kaṇṇā
teṟkaṭaiya nilam māvum mūṉṟām pāṭaka nilamarai māvum nālām pāṭaka māvum Āṟām pāṭaka ciṟumaṇṇamāvaraiyum nālāvatu mutal Antarāyam viṉiyokamum mākkalamum taṭippatakkum Uṭpaṭa mātam
meṉṟum vācaṟkaṭamaikkuc coṉṉamaiyil ceṉṟu kaṉṭattuttava kala ñāṉadevarkkum Ivar santāṉattut tapasyaṟkum maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyākap pākaṉūr kūṟṟattuc coḻakulāntakac caturveti maṅkalattu
paṇṇi Āsa ṇyabhaṭṭaṉum pakkal Ivarrolai koṇṭu m Ivāṇṭu mu
tal Antarāyamum taṭippatakkum Uṭpaṭa maṭappuṟa yiṟaiyiliyāka yum nam Ōlaiyun tarac coṉṉom Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ ce ta kalliluñ cempilu veṭ(ṭi)ṭuvittuk
koḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāy Ivai miḻalai kūṟṟattu naṭuviṟ kūṟṟattu pullūrk kuṭi pe moṇṇaippirāṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa virāṭarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai maturotaiya vaḷanāṭṭu kāñaiyirukkai Uḻak
ṉa tirumalaiyuṭaiyāṉāṉa cakarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai maḻacempiṉāṭṭu pāla keṭaka vaṉa rāja viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nattūruṭaiyāṉāṉa poṉṉa Uparaiyār pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai miḻalaik
kūṟṟattukku maka veṭciyūrāṉa mummuṭi coḻa nallūr paṭṭaṉūrruṭaiyāṉ Eṇaikkanti tevaṉ kularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ciṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ coṟi nila karaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
maṇalūr Irāmaṉāl pullūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 36.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
